# Newark Food Factory

> A food innovation hub powering daily meals, delivery, events, and food entrepreneurs in Newark, NJ.

## About

Newark Food Factory is a social enterprise food innovation hub at the intersection of education, production, and entrepreneurship. We combine a commercial kitchen, business incubator, and community food hub into one powerful ecosystem — from students learning real-world skills to experienced chefs scaling their businesses.

## Location

Newark, NJ 07102, United States

## Services

- **Commissary Kitchen Membership**: Licensed commercial kitchen access with flexible scheduling, storage, and business support. Plans from $149/month to $5,000+/month.
- **Food Business Incubator**: Launch and grow your food business with mentorship, resources, and commercial kitchen access.
- **Daily Meals & Catering**: Fresh daily meals for pickup and delivery, plus full-service catering for events.
- **Event Space Rental**: Private events, corporate gatherings, and community celebrations.
- **Food Truck Commissary**: Commissary base for food truck operators with storage, prep space, and business coaching.
- **Chef Studio**: Content creation platform and live dining experiences for chefs building their brand.

## Programs

- **Work-Based Learning**: Hands-on culinary workforce development training.
- **Food Business Incubator**: Mentorship and resources to launch food ventures.
- **Food Truck Membership**: Commissary and business support for food truck owners.
- **Product Development Lab**: Recipe-to-retail pipeline for food product creators.
